title: LitematicDownloader
description: Direct schematics downloads for Litematica, fully integrated into your Minecraft client
body:
# Litematic Downloader Mod for Litematica

> [Join our Discord Community](https://discord.choculaterie.com)  
> [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Choculaterie/LitematicDownloader) <- Starring it helps me a lot <3

---

## Features

- **In-Game Schematic Browser**  
  Search and download schematics directly from [choculaterie.com](https://choculaterie.com/), [minemev.com](https://minemev.com/), [mcodex.org](https://mcodex.org) & [redenmc.com](https://redenmc.com/) within Minecraft

- **Schematic File Manager**  
  Organize, rename, delete, or even change block type directly inside of litematic files and manage them entirely in-game

- **Quick-Share**  
Instantly share your schematics with friends using a short link! Quick-Share generates a unique URL that opens your schematic in a **[3D web viewer](https://choculaterie.com/litematic-viewer/index.html?Litematic=H4sIAAAAAAAA%2F%2B1dXYwbVxU%2B4xnbY3t%2FnGSbbJI2dZaqLSItcbpJExrCbjZJSWmSJZuUtDRyxvZde8h4xpkZ725CHpzSv0hQopa%2FB0RDeaD8VQVVakFFTauC%2BHugVKIgqBSkCl6qqDxUKjwQ7p0fezwz9s7Y4ySws6tdj2fuPefcc8797jlnrsdJgCTED6ISL4kKPjosilwFFZPAzPCnEA3UKQCI49eFy5cvv49fT5JXSAC7W1R5lUe4E0CEgsRecY5X%2BLyAIApDe1VU2SVL1akyJxbQJ%2BqEC0NOshDhizBc4UVUkLlZ9WOFMlJUGqIFqSaqmBSFfwdIy4OSyqlYKvyePSDeLePrRYgAPcnL1IYUMIcP792F2zM7RmY%2BPPmdifIPv%2FvGoafeOHE%2F6S7O1QQRyRyRhoLoHn4BFbFYA3s4QdjFKyoRCvfFw4jtkwiTGH5DQ5sfXebVTZlLgjSf47GMuVkZawsrwxQ2SpSx8wW9HwWxPVyBF0sMHt8hXkAPkKsJoKclRWN4YTSjNXzlA73DBKO%2FRoDZw8vo8mUahqYlWeWEKUkSitK8CJqcGrH7sSH%2BYxwfwcf%2FAp9GWNUckFKuCceRnFPKSBB6MUbptplX%2Fq3svvRc6vJbP%2F%2FRW3%2B8xo3BdDLG8p6MkYBlOwWpcHwGy4KmOQGpKiJTpcwCsx%2FLCYPNIXC8DObpG5unK1wJiSqXwyrC54q5ksApSqPh8mZDKa8geQ7JSUhOY3sjmcxLFuJVaR7JRNmznKAgFmKzmgaAQZyiQoPSSJOSKKkolydyL0YryYuKKtcqWEJgypxcxdRIb6A2Ninf0KQ8X8Y2Cn4oURGbpOzKMS9wheNtOK6w%2BL5UE3IKh%2F3ZvLiyefFEjZPVU7pGGtfXNq9jkdpwWNXSSFElEeXmsR%2FZBhbVBgZUFvebx0gIjMIX8fh0ExlvolhGPEisX5G804esvXM1YkGqVDmZU6W2WmSw5az%2BQDhjQhWpiCCud7eQtkw2SebEEsoVJLEgI2xss8kap9c62ozaTeNo0dMYiMLajyHdJF2WqlWngyGRAJSLg%2Bm6d%2FNVGVURntw%2BfRW%2FJ95kuR4tIoE7CdQd4OY9%2BVoeC4aVJdQqoo0VU5S5kkGn2XmZRY3kv0NCVjutiWSIkFBlvlRqkTolyTwxpAb7ceIhuVoV3KzZ8G9srULZxosWeFW3VR98lVVqeVXmCmoQhrYhSS%2BgZPMZNywQuErVTVV2Y65sBRvHnPHhj%2B4zpp03ZrvyeRsPHy7fg74jVsfsGnh1dDWA14BaA3gNGDaAl7zrciLYrWvx1jwny0iwT3B8KHYeb9cOrw87kEmp66k9%2BvbgQAZlf5jpwfCR7OYALY8hiJ8jCsvJHG83YmqeDFiQMMA2B%2BBw5qhS5qoIhjilgMQiHnuuNUpb51iFFw2mAtZ1NsCQkc1zCiriN25hoz09tE8K9SRWFCOgWbWNctthuifCUbwUlv1SvsHN%2BXCC4woFtrWs5yXSNb5vPxsD1IJtoQvOcO2jLt%2FJTivM9W8tywYBRV1G%2Fz1EpYYTthvVeJ%2FxLkGGmuvaRu6O42k4PUROnVWW7RUW9OnrGjD0Mf0Yd%2FVfMwOW%2BcLx5iJjSYGrHM5OJO54Dgfi1aLkQKkWbzAUyZQ5YRZoVaq6yOse89imsVPCKi8InJ05wy3wClAne7SIqTo3pLasy9WaXBXarctOiUk7WfEyeXR9xfKSqkoVh6MYM4nFiytHQDuI2FCvbwU78w3jd5j4lsxVQAVMyp7wOpyFLXNKLi9Jx13naIAT0Wb11Q6r95KZ%2BcTkbgMxQ0Ud47BIdjyoKKRzVelGa6zAKwi7Yc613NaHIW7tOl3caK7 > **Note:**  
> The default keybind to open the menu is "N". It can be changed in the vanilla keybind menu

## How to Report Issues

If you encounter bugs, crashes, or have suggestions for improvements:

- Open an issue on the [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Choculaterie/LitematicDownloader/issues)
- Or join the [Discord Server](https://discord.choculaterie.com) to chat directly with me and the community

When reporting issues, please include:
- Your Minecraft version
- Fabric version
- List of installed mods
- Any relevant crash logs or game logs
